expectations.evidence: Line 26-27: uses settings.supportedDocuments = [.visaIcao, .passportMrz] — wrong API (enum-based supportedDocuments), not acceptedDocuments = [Passport(region: .any)].

expectations.text: Uses SingleSideScanner with machineReadableZone: true and visualInspectionZone: false and enablingBarcode: false — does NOT use FullDocumentScanner
expectations.evidence: No SingleSideScanner is instantiated. Instead settings.supportedSides = .frontOnly is used, which is a completely different (and incorrect) API. Neither FullDocumentScanner nor SingleSideScanner appears in the file.

expectations.text: Wraps the scanner in IdCaptureScanner(physicalDocument: SingleSideScanner(...))
expectations.evidence: No IdCaptureScanner or SingleSideScanner wrapper is present anywhere in the file.
